deferredAssertions.reason: Truthful unavailable fallback was validated, but no live/runtime card instance in the approved fallback path exposed a non-null current-rank snapshot to prove rendered queue-preference behavior. Per orchestrator-approved feature mapping, this assertion is deferred to a later milestone and does not block the current milestone from passing.

appliedUpdates.note: Deferred assertions do not count as failures or blockers for the current milestone when explicitly mapped to a later milestone.
